subject: cherche solution pour automatisation de taches
snippet: Bonjour, Je cherche une solution pour un système d'automatisation pour le traitement des demandes de devis. Fournissez vous ce genre de service? -- Malo
body:
Bonjour,

Je cherche une solution pour un système d'automatisation pour le traitement
des demandes de devis.
Fournissez vous ce genre de service?

-- 
Malo

subject: Just published: "Estimating residential outage costs under inclining block electricity rates in China"
snippet: Academia.edu Dear Malo Yamakado, Because your work is cited in a similar paper, we think you might be interested in this recently published article from Academia Green Energy: Estimating residential
body:
Dear Malo Yamakado,

Because your work is cited in a similar paper, we think you might be interested in this recently published article from Academia Green Energy, an open access journal.

"Estimating residential outage costs under inclining block electricity rates in China"
by: Kang Hua Cao, Yuk-Shing Cheng, Han Steffan Qi, Chi-Keung Woo
view: https://www.academia.edu/keypass/VDFqL2x6VnowbitUeStiSGV6MWZ6MisvQnAzSXNLd2hXZmN5Z3NZVVhZcz0tLW1CTFlhRi9XdXdpY3JOZDZMS2lmY1E9PQ==--f00cac6b383a5977c470316201e524f7c71e358e/t/bfScn-S54mRgo-Svwa0/144956761/Estimating_residential_outage_costs_under_inclining_block_electricity_rates_in_China

About Academia Green Energy
Academia Green Energy is an innovative open access journal publishing original research and review articles covering all areas of green energy. The editors welcome interdisciplinary submissions from the cutting edge of green energy research, in particular, those that drive connectivity between disciplines.

-----

Follow the link below to disable these notifications:

https://academia.edu/keypass/VDFqL2x6VnowbitUeStiSGV6MWZ6MisvQnAzSXNLd2hXZmN5Z3NZVVhZcz0tLW1CTFlhRi9XdXdpY3JOZDZMS2lmY1E9PQ==--f00cac6b383a5977c470316201e524f7c71e358e/t/bfScn-S54mRgo-Svwa0/confirm_unsubscribe/publishing_distribution

Academia.edu, 580 California St., Suite 400, San Francisco, CA, 94104

subject: deamnde le prix - AMAREX
snippet: Bonjour, Je vous présente mes Meilleurs Vœux pour cette Nouvelle Année Nous souhaiterions avoir votre meilleure offre de prix revendeur et vos délais pour la demande ci-dessous : Produit : Industrial
body:
Bonjour,



Je vous présente mes Meilleurs Vœux pour cette Nouvelle Année



Nous souhaiterions avoir votre meilleure offre de prix revendeur et vos
délais pour la demande ci-dessous :

*Produit : Industrial VRLA Battery, 12 V, 7 Ah, AGM construction*

*Manufacturer: YUASA*

*P/N: NP7-12FR*

*Quantité : 18*



*Produit : Battery Smart Charger, 12 V, 12 A*

*Manufacturer: YUASA*

*P/N: YCX12*

*Quantité : 2*



*Livraison :* France

Par avance merci pour votre retour et à votre entière disposition pour tout
complément d’information.



Bonne fin de journée.

Bien cordialement,





*Laurence Grégoire*

Service Export

-- 
Malo

subject: Distributed integrated design for optimity and safety of hypersonic flight vehicle swarm
snippet: On September 1st, 1859, British astronomer Richard Carrington watched something unusual happen on the surface of the Sun. Two bright points of light flared up, and then faded. Less than a day later,
body:
Hi there,

It looks like you’re currently viewing the plain text version of this email.

Plain text cannot display our content properly, and is not supported by our platform.

Please switch to the HTML version of this message.

Thank you,

JournalClub.io.

classification.reason: The subject line mentions 'Distributed integrated design for optimity and safety of hypersonic flight vehicle swarm', which suggests it is related to a newsletter or informational content from JournalClub.io. The body text also indicates that the email is promoting switching to an HTML version, typical of newsletters.
